response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth across languages and tooling, with clear experience in test automation, CI/CD, and developer tooling (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Selenium course), but lacks explicit evidence of people management, team leadership, or organizational change initiatives required for this managerial role, and his recent career gap and fragmented employment history raise questions about sustained leadership continuity.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools and test infrastructure (e.g., test runners, CI/CD systems, Selenium course)
Proven ability to work across mobile, web, and embedded platforms with strong system design skills
Active open-source contributor with documented tooling projects that demonstrate initiative and technical craftsmanship
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience beyond technical mentoring
Recent career gap (2025–present) and short tenures at recent roles may indicate instability or lack of sustained impact
Lacks explicit experience with mobile platform ecosystems or organizational change leadership as preferred qualifications
